data.title: [EPIC] Integrate skogix personal workspace into broader skogai ecosystem
data.description:
**Context:** The skogix submodule was added to skogai as a personal workspace folder. Now we need to make architectural decisions about how each component integrates with the broader ecosystem.

**Goal:** Clean integration strategy that avoids duplication while preserving useful personal workspace capabilities.

**Component Integration Issues:**

1. **#4** - Integrate .claude/ personal workspace (hooks, skills, settings)
2. **#5** - Integrate actions/ skill examples (28 documented skills)
3. **#6** - Resolve docs/skogix/ duplication (parent vs submodule)
4. **#7** - Strategy for src/ external project submodules (15+ projects)
5. **#8** - Coordinate system-setup/ ansible structure
6. **#9** - Integrate todo/ project context folders
7. **#10** - Integrate prompts/ template system
8. **#11** - Integrate scripts/ utility scripts

**Current Status:**

* ✅ skogix submodule added and initialized
* ✅ skogix todos migrated to GitHub issues (#101-107)
* ⏳ Architectural decisions needed for each component

**Success Criteria:**

* Clear single source of truth for each type of content
* No unnecessary duplication between parent and submodule
* Personal workspace capabilities preserved where valuable
* Team-shared resources properly integrated into parent

**Next Steps:**

1. Tackle each component issue individually
2. Document decisions in parent [CLAUDE.md](<http://CLAUDE.md>)
3. Update skogix/CLAUDE.md with integration patterns
4. Clean up skogix folder structure based on decisions
